description: AEPEX telemetry decode regression: a real CRC-OK off-air frame (captured from a SkyRoof recording via the headless StreamingPipeline decoder) pinned to a few expected aepex_sw_stat fields. Guards the C2 ksy->JSON converter's CCSDS-dispatch path (tools/ksy_to_json.py -> Telemetry/Definitions/68506_AEPEX.json) + TelemetryParser. The pinned fields prove the full CCSDS chain: 16-byte skip past AX.25 header + pid, the 6-byte primary-header bitstruct, dispatch on the b10 application_process_id (=1 -> aepex_sw_stat), the conditional secondary header (if secondary_header_flag), and the big-endian payload ints + bit flags.
